rationale: The citing paper’s core theory/mechanism is about gender-neutral marketing reducing reliance on product aesthetics via lowered binary gender stereotype endorsement, whereas the cited paper is about referrer reward disclosure in referral programs via communal-norm compatibility and psychological barriers. Based on the notes, this looks most likely to be an incidental/background citation rather than a substantive dependency.
